rationale: The citing paper relies on hierarchical Bayes random-effects MNL estimation via MCMC to produce customer-level microtargeting decisions, while the cited paper specifically develops scalable distributed MCMC for Bayesian hierarchical target marketing with consumer-level posteriors. Given this direct methodological and domain overlap in the notes (despite only one DOI match and no in-text snippet), the citation is plausibly substantive rather than an obvious incidental mention.
